_comment: Provider contract example — nightlights_ntl_feed.v1. Raw VIIRS NTL point samples for a Bangalore bbox, as the ingestor receives them before H3 aggregation. Six samples across 2 H3 cells illustrate all four quality_flag values (ok, cloud_contaminated, void_filled, no_data) as well as both real and synthetic provenance.

samples._comment: Cell 8860145b39fffff — Central Bangalore CBD. High radiance (commercial core), clean data.

provenance.license: NASA Earthdata — open access with attribution

samples._comment: Central Bangalore — second pixel, still clean.

provenance.license: NASA Earthdata — open access with attribution

samples._comment: Central Bangalore — cloud-contaminated pixel; confidence reduced to 0.65.

provenance.license: NASA Earthdata — open access with attribution

samples._comment: Cell 8860145a1bfffff — Peri-urban Bangalore / Kengeri. Low radiance (residential fringe).

provenance.license: NASA Earthdata — open access with attribution

samples._comment: Peri-urban — gap-filled pixel (cloud cover for the whole month).

provenance.license: NASA Earthdata — open access with attribution

samples._comment: Peri-urban — no-data pixel (missing observations for composite period).

provenance.license: NASA Earthdata — open access with attribution
